0.q: AeHSFA2b plays a significant role in enhancing salt stress tolerance by positively regulating the raffinose synthesis via regulation of RFS4.

1.q: Raffinose Synthase (RFS, EC 2.4.1.82), which are responsible for raffinose biosynthesis, play a key role in response to abiotic stresses.

2.q: AeHSFA2b can directly control the expression of AeRFS4 by binding to the core HSE sequence (CTTGAAGCTTCAAG) located in the promoter regions of RFS4.
